channel.subject: Suggested awesome-claude-code entry: Ralph Workflow

submitted_payload.suggested_entry: Ralph Workflow — free and open-source autonomous coding workflow orchestrator for Claude Code/Codex-style runs that aims to hand back finished, tested code ready to review

why_this_action: Codeberg adoption is still flat, same-family directory and curator bursts had already been reset, and awesome-claude-code is a fresh high-fit Claude Code ecosystem list with a live Agent Orchestration section and direct maintainer contact. Sending a Codeberg-primary inclusion request here was the strongest executable reset target available right now.

measurement_window.success_signal: reply, merged listing, or another qualified backlink path that sends evaluators to the Codeberg primary repo
measurement_window.kill_condition: If no reply or inclusion signal arrives by 2026-06-06, retire this target and move to a different untouched reset target instead of re-sending the same pitch.
